g.text: Tech Upgrade: had challenges with lower version, help to upgrade and also added new features to onboard products across agency and banca for new product launches in 2 weeks time.

text.data-name: Life Policy Quote, Underwriting for Agency, Bancassurance & Bro

g.text: Life Policy Training module covers with gamification, score across Underwriting distribution(Agency, Bancassurance & Broker) & Claims
